arts.ttl: Wolves need to cut out errors - O'Neil
arts.sum: Wolves need to cut out errors if they are to move away from the bottom of the Premier League, says boss Gary O'Neil.

arts.ttl: I saw a different Sean Dyche today - it's a side his Everton staff have told me about
arts.sum: Chris Beesley takes a look behind the scenes on covering Sean Dyche's pre-match press conference to preview Everton's home game with Wolverhampton Wanderers

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche makes 'error' admission as Everton fight for Premier League survival
arts.sum: Everton face Wolves in a relegation showdown at Goodison Park and Sean Dyche has been frank when addressing what has gone wrong this season
Sean Dyche says he is working harder than ever before to lift Everton from the doldrums.

arts.ttl: 'It's simple' - Sean Dyche feelings made clear as Everton sent message
arts.sum: Liverpool ECHO readers have been sharing their thoughts on the current situation at Everton and expressed their concerns about the direction of the club.

arts.ttl: Everton interim CEO shares takeover update and confirms Farhad Moshiri move
arts.sum: Interim Everton CEO Colin Chong has written to club shareholders to explain the current situation

arts.ttl: Everton and West Ham have ‘convincing arguments’ for manager – Hammers have the advantage
arts.sum: Portuguese manager Sergio Conceiçao has receiving ‘convincing arguments’ from Everton and West Ham United but would prefer the latter if it came to a choice between the pair and even Nantes. That’s according to L’Equipe, who cover reports that Nantes are looking at the former Porto coach as a possible replacement for Antoine Kombouaré. arts.ttl: Supercomputer predicts Man Utd's chances of Champions League qualification after Everton win
arts.sum: Man Utd's chances of returning to Europe's top-tier competition has been quantified by Opta's supercomputer.

arts.ttl: Why Everton and Liverpool have unusual kick-off times this week after Premier League decision
arts.sum: Both Everton and Liverpool are in midweek Premier League action this week and are kicking off their matches at non-traditional times.

arts.ttl: Everton and Nantes target Sergio Conceição favours West Ham move
arts.sum: FC Nantes, as reported by Ouest-France are considering a shock attempt to bring Sergio Conceição back to the club. The Portuguese manager is in demand following his departure from FC Porto, with…
